# Let me check what ANTLR sees by looking at the token stream

with open('build/test/task0/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
        print(f'Line {i+1}: {repr(line)}')"
